'''Revkinn V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] known for its megalopolises.

==History==
During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] organization [[Churhee's Riflemen]] carried out an assignment on Revkinn V, to seek out [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cells in the planet's cities.<ref name="Galaxy at War">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>
